assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Create Profile adaptation renders with rotate stepper
assertions.reason: Both /demo/rotate-keyset-create-profile and /rotate-keyset/profile were reachable and rendered rotate-keyset adaptation content including rotate stepper label, assigned local share panel, and Continue CTA.

steps.expected: Create Profile adaptation renders with rotate-keyset stepper variant
steps.observed: Page loaded with Create Profile content, Rotate Keyset stepper label, Assigned Local Share section, and Continue to Distribute Shares CTA.

steps.action: Capture screenshot + check browser errors on demo route
steps.expected: Screenshot captured and no console/page errors
steps.observed: Screenshot saved and agent-browser errors output was empty.

steps.expected: Direct route is reachable and shows same adaptation screen
steps.observed: Direct route stayed at /rotate-keyset/profile and rendered matching Create Profile adaptation content.

steps.action: Capture screenshot + check browser errors on direct route
steps.expected: Screenshot captured and no console/page errors
steps.observed: Screenshot saved and agent-browser errors output was empty.

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Distribute Shares adaptation renders with rotate stepper
assertions.reason: Both /demo/rotate-keyset-distribute and /rotate-keyset/distribute were reachable and rendered rotate-stepper adaptation content with expected share cards, locked password placeholder, and completion CTA.

steps.expected: Distribute Shares adaptation renders with rotate-keyset stepper and expected share states
steps.observed: Page loaded with Rotate Keyset + Distribute Shares labels, Saved to Igloo Web pill, Enter password to unlock placeholder, and Continue to Completion CTA.

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset Complete adaptation renders
assertions.reason: Both /demo/rotate-keyset-complete and /rotate-keyset/complete were reachable and rendered the completion adaptation with rotate stepper labels, distribution status rows, success card, and Finish Distribution CTA.

steps.expected: Distribution Completion adaptation renders with rotate-keyset stepper and completion content
steps.observed: Page loaded with Rotate Keyset + Distribution Completion labels, Igloo Mobile/Igloo Desktop status rows, All packages distributed panel, and Finish Distribution CTA.
